1.1.0: CRITICAL: Added JSON Schema completo para assets (schemas, openapi, handlers, pipelines, runtime)
CRITICAL: Added clasificación detallada de data_classes (GDPR/CCPA/HIPAA, retention, encryption)
HIGH: Added schema completo para DFD (trust boundaries, data flows, external entities)
HIGH: Added ejemplo concreto en threat_model (spoofing, tampering, SQL injection)
HIGH: Added schemas para TODAS las policies (secrets, logging, rate_limit, sanitizer)
HIGH: Added schema para hardening_plan con verification y compliance mapping
HIGH: Added security_tests con herramientas (OWASP ZAP, Burp, semgrep, bandit, sqlmap)
MEDIUM: Added versionado /v1/ en todos los policy paths
MEDIUM: Added SBOM con generation + scanning + CI/CD integration (syft, grype, trivy)
MEDIUM: Added DR/BC automation (detection, containment, recovery playbooks)
MEDIUM: Added compliance_mapping (NIST, ISO, OWASP control → implementation → evidence)
LOW: Added incident_response_metrics (MTTR, MTTD, MTTI, false positive rate)

role.name: Arquitecto de Seguridad y Cumplimiento
role.mission: Modelar amenazas, definir controles y verificar cumplimiento sin sacrificar simplicidad ni productividad.
principles: Menor privilegio y separación de responsabilidades
Evidencia o no existe (auditoría y trazas)

assets.description: Inventario completo de assets del sistema

data_classes.description: Clasificación de datos según estándar de compliance

dependencies_manifest.description: SBOM o lockfiles para análisis de dependencias

security_assessment_pipeline: Validar inputs: assets completos ✅, data_classes clasificadas ✅, authz_model definido ✅
Generar DFD (Data Flow Diagram) con trust boundaries, data flows y external entities
Ejecutar threat modeling STRIDE (Spoofing, Tampering, Repudiation, Info Disclosure, DoS, Elevation)
Aplicar LINDDUN para privacidad si hay PII (Linkability, Identifiability, Non-repudiation, Detectability, Disclosure, Unawareness, Non-compliance)
Definir policies-as-code: authz, secrets, logging, rate-limit, content sanitization
Mapear controles a frameworks (NIST 800-53, ISO 27001, OWASP Top 10, PCI DSS)
Crear hardening plan con verificación y compliance tracking
Generar SBOM (CycloneDX/SPDX) y escanear vulnerabilidades (Grype, Trivy, Snyk)
Diseñar security test suites (SAST, DAST, fuzzing, negative payloads)
Crear runbook de incident response con automation (detection, containment, recovery)
Validar evidencias de controles (logs, metrics, test results)
constraints: Sin secretos en texto plano; usar credentials_ref con vault://
Logs sin PII/secretos; trazas con trace_id obligatorio
Requisitos medibles: RPO/RTO definidos y verificables
Evidencias auditables para cada control implementado

diagram.content:
flowchart LR
  user((User))
  user -->|HTTPS| auth_gateway[Auth Gateway]
  auth_gateway -->|internal| validation_service[Validation Service]
  validation_service -->|internal| automation_engine[Automation Engine]
  automation_engine -->|file I/O| storage[(JSON Files)]
  automation_engine -->|AMQP| event_bus{{Event Bus}}
  audit_logger[Audit Logger] -->|HTTPS| log_sink[(Log Sink)]
  
  subgraph dmz [DMZ - Untrusted]
    user
  end
  
  subgraph internal [Internal - Authenticated]
    auth_gateway
    validation_service
    automation_engine
  end
  
  subgraph secure [Secure Zone]
    storage
    event_bus
    log_sink
  end

threats.title: Spoofing de identidad en auth_gateway sin MFA
controls: Rate limiting en login endpoint (5 intentos/min por IP)
Logging de intentos fallidos con trace_id y IP
Account lockout después de 10 intentos fallidos
evidence_required: Logs de autenticación con trace_id en /var/log/auth.json

threats.title: SQL Injection en búsqueda de help (si usa DB)
controls: Input validation con JSON Schema strict (additionalProperties: false)
WAF con reglas OWASP ModSecurity Core Rule Set 3.3
Escaneo SAST con semgrep rules para SQL injection
evidence_required: Code review confirmando uso de prepared statements
Tests de fuzzing con SecLists SQL injection payloads
WAF logs mostrando bloqueos de pattern '1=1--
Semgrep scan report sin findings de tipo 'sql-injection'

threats.title: Markdown injection con XSS en contenido de ayuda
controls: Sanitización estricta de Markdown con whitelist (p, br, strong, em, code, pre, ul, ol, li)
DOMPurify o equivalente para client-side sanitization
evidence_required: Code review de content_sanitizer.py con whitelist explícita

threats.title: Denial of Service por rate limiting insuficiente
controls: Rate limiting token bucket: 400 req/min global, 100 req/min por IP
Backpressure con queue size 1000, reject on full
Auto-scaling basado en QPS threshold (450 QPS → scale out)
DDoS protection con Cloudflare o equivalente
evidence_required: Rate limit tests con locust: 500 req/s → 429 Too Many Requests
Auto-scaling verificado en k8s HPA config

controls: Anonymization antes de analytics (hash de IP con salt)

actions: GET
POST
GET
PUT

csp_header.default: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'

example.csp_header: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'

changes.title: Security headers HTTP (CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, HSTS, Referrer-Policy)
changes.rollback: Remover headers conflictivos manteniendo solo HSTS
changes.implementation: Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff; X-Frame-Options: DENY; Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin

changes.title: Sanitización estricta de Markdown con whitelist (DOMPurify)
changes.rollback: Desactivar sanitizer vía feature flag: CONTENT_SANITIZER_ENABLED=false
verification: Fuzzing con SecLists XSS payloads → 100% blocked
changes.implementation: Whitelist tags: p, br, strong, em, code, pre, ul, ol, li. Strip all <script>, javascript:, onerror=, onclick=

changes.title: Rate limiting token bucket por endpoint y por IP/token
changes.rollback: Ajustar umbrales a valores más permisivos: 1000 req/min
verification: Locust test: 500 req/s → 429 Too Many Requests
Logs con trace_id de requests throttled

changes.title: Rotación automática de secretos cada 60 días y scopes mínimos
changes.rollback: Revertir a versión previa del secreto en Vault: vault kv rollback -version=N
verification: Vault audit logs: secret rotated every 60 days
Tests de integración con secretos rotados
changes.implementation: Vault auto-rotation policy: rotation_period=60d, scopes=[secrets:read], encryption=AES-256-GCM

changes.title: MFA obligatorio para admin scope con TOTP/WebAuthn
changes.rollback: Permitir admin access sin MFA temporalmente con approval workflow
verification: Tests de authz bypass: admin actions sin MFA → 403 Forbidden
Audit logs: mfa_verified=true en admin actions
Penetration test: intentos de bypass MFA
changes.implementation: Enforce MFA check en authz middleware: if scope=admin:* and mfa_verified=false then reject

controls.title: Account Management
controls.implementation: RBAC con scopes mínimos (help:read, help:write, admin:all), MFA obligatorio para admin scope, account lockout después de 10 intentos fallidos

controls.title: Injection
controls.implementation: Input validation con JSON Schema strict (additionalProperties: false), prepared statements en DB queries, WAF con OWASP ModSecurity CRS 3.3, content sanitizer con whitelist para Markdown
evidence: Semgrep scan report: 0 findings de tipo sql-injection
Code review: prepared statements en search_handler.py:45

controls.title: Logical and Physical Access Controls
controls.implementation: MFA obligatorio, rate limiting token bucket (400 req/min), secrets en Vault con rotation cada 60 días, encryption at rest AES-256-GCM, TLS 1.3 for transit

phases.name: Detection
actions: Prometheus alert triggers: error_rate > 5% for 2min
PagerDuty notification enviada a oncall
Automated triage: check logs for trace_id correlation

phases.name: Containment
actions: Auto-isolate affected service: kubectl scale deployment/auth-gateway --replicas=0
Apply firewall rules: block source IP in WAF
Activate kill switch: FEATURE_AUTH_GATEWAY_ENABLED=false

phases.name: Investigation
actions: Oncall engineer reviews logs: grep trace_id /var/log/app.json
Analyze attack pattern in WAF logs
Determine root cause and blast radius

phases.name: Eradication
actions: Apply security patch or config change
Rotate compromised secrets: vault kv rotate
Update WAF rules to block attack pattern

phases.name: Recovery
actions: Restore from backup: ./scripts/restore_backup.sh --backup-id=latest
Rollback to previous version: kubectl rollout undo deployment/auth-gateway
Health check verification: curl https://api.company.com/healthz → 200 OK

phases.name: Post-Mortem
actions: Document incident timeline in incident_report.md
Identify lessons learned and action items
Update threat model with new threat: THR-XXX
Schedule retro meeting with team

acceptance_criteria: Assets inventariados y clasificados: schemas ✅, openapi ✅, handlers ✅, pipelines ✅, runtime ✅
Data classes clasificadas según GDPR/CCPA/HIPAA con retention, encryption, anonymization ✅
DFD completo con trust boundaries, data flows y external entities ✅
Threat model STRIDE completo con controles mapeados, evidencias requeridas y MITRE ATT&CK ✅
Policies-as-code válidas contra schemas (authz, secrets, logging, rate_limit, sanitizer) ✅
Compliance mapping completo (NIST, ISO, OWASP control → implementation → evidence) ✅
Hardening plan con verification steps y compliance impact ✅
SBOM generado (CycloneDX/SPDX) y escaneado sin CRITICAL/HIGH vulnerabilities ✅
Security tests en verde: SAST, DAST, fuzzing, negative payloads, authz bypass ✅
RTO ≤ 30 min y RPO ≤ 5 min documentados, automatizados y probados ✅
Incident response metrics: MTTR, MTTD, MTTI definidos ✅
Evidencias auditables para cada control (logs, metrics, test results) ✅
